statement.markdown: Given a string input, construct a Trie and add all the prefixes of the string into the Trie. After that, return the root of the Trie. Note that the Trie should be constructed from left to right.

examples.explanation: The prefixes of the string are a, ap, apl, ape, app, appl, appl, appe, appl, appl, appl, appl, apple, b, ba, ban, ban, bana, banan, banana, c, ca, car, car, ch, cha, cha, che, cherry,

hints.text: The given code is trying to add the prefixes of the string into the Trie. However, it is adding the entire string instead of the prefixes. Fix this issue.
